{"content":"🚀 **[Wazuh Active Response]**

🔍 **VT Verdict:** $get_result.body.report.summary.taxonomies.#0.level
📊 **VT Score:** $get_result.body.report.summary.taxonomies.#0.value
🛡️ **System:** Wazuh SOAR Automation (Shuffle)"}
